Defines a list of profiler nodes for timing specific operations in the system.

# Purpose
This code is a collection of profiler node definitions used for performance monitoring in a software application. Each `PROFILER_NODE` macro represents a specific section of the code where timing measurements can be started and stopped, allowing developers to track the execution time of various processes. The nodes include tasks such as `mic`, `framebuffer_dma`, `render_modal`, and others, which likely correspond to different functional areas or operations within the application. These nodes help in identifying performance bottlenecks and optimizing the application's efficiency.
